C:\Users\PEPEPAREDES\Downloads\cmake-3.30.0-rc3-windows-x86_64\cmake-3.30.0-rc3-windows-x86_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Lab10Boids.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\Lab10Boids.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Lab10Boids.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Lab10Boids.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o Lab10Boids.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libLab10Boids.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Lab10Boids.dir\linkLibs.rsp
